subcodes.first_line: O ye favored ones, O ye mystics, O ye lovers, praise ye God that ye have turned your faces toward the Kingdom of existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقبلان ای عارفان ای عاشقان حمد کنید خدا را که بملکوت وجود اقبال نمودید و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement
